directive:
Children are still being processed. Monitor progress via koto workflows. When all children have reached terminal states, inspect their outcomes via koto status and koto context get to determine batch_outcome, then submit batch_outcome.

- all_success: all children reached a non-failure terminal state
- needs_attention: some children reached done_blocked or were skipped

Do NOT re-run plan-to-tasks.sh or re-submit tasks — the children were already dispatched.
